message.content:
```plantuml
@startuml
hide footbox
skinparam shadowing false
skinparam sequenceMessageAlign left
skinparam NoteBackgroundColor #FFF9C4
skinparam NoteBorderColor #BDB76B

actor User
participant "executor:AnalysisExecutor" as Exec
participant ":Analysis" as Analysis
participant ":CountryCaseAPIGetter" as CaseGetter
participant ":CountryDeathAPIGetter" as DeathGetter
participant ":CountryPopulationAPIGetter" as PopGetter
participant ":APIInformationGetter" as InfoGetter
actor "Covid API" as CovidAPI

User -> Exec : runAnalysis()
activate Exec

opt At least one country selected for analysis
  Exec -> Analysis : analyze()
  activate Analysis

  alt CasesPerCapitaAnalysis
    par
      Analysis -> CaseGetter : getCases()
      activate CaseGetter
      CaseGetter -> InfoGetter : getDataURL()
      activate InfoGetter
      InfoGetter --> CaseGetter : API Endpoint URL
      deactivate InfoGetter
      CaseGetter -> CovidAPI : API Call
      activate CovidAPI
      CovidAPI --> CaseGetter : API Information
      deactivate CovidAPI
      CaseGetter --> Analysis : Cases in target Countries
      deactivate CaseGetter

      Analysis -> PopGetter : getPopulation()
      activate PopGetter
      PopGetter -> InfoGetter : getDataURL()
      activate InfoGetter
      InfoGetter --> PopGetter : API Endpoint URL
      deactivate InfoGetter
      PopGetter -> CovidAPI : API Call
      activate CovidAPI
      CovidAPI --> PopGetter : API Information
      deactivate CovidAPI
      PopGetter --> Analysis : Population of target Countries
      deactivate PopGetter
    end
  else TotalCaseAnalysis
    Analysis -> CaseGetter : getCases()
    activate CaseGetter
    CaseGetter -> InfoGetter : getDataURL()
    activate InfoGetter
    InfoGetter --> CaseGetter : API Endpoint URL
    deactivate InfoGetter
    CaseGetter -> CovidAPI : API Call
    activate CovidAPI
    CovidAPI --> CaseGetter : API Information
    deactivate CovidAPI
    CaseGetter --> Analysis : Cases in target Countries
    deactivate CaseGetter
  else MajorityCaseSexPerCapitaAnalysis
    par
      Analysis -> CaseGetter : getMaleCases()
      activate CaseGetter
      CaseGetter -> InfoGetter : getDataURL()
      activate InfoGetter
      InfoGetter --> CaseGetter : API Endpoint URL
      deactivate InfoGetter
      CaseGetter -> CovidAPI : API Call
      activate CovidAPI
      CovidAPI --> CaseGetter : API Information
      deactivate CovidAPI
      CaseGetter --> Analysis : Male cases in target Countries
      deactivate CaseGetter

      Analysis -> CaseGetter : getFemaleCases()
      note right of CaseGetter
        A call to the endpoint has\nalready been made so\nanother is not necessary
      end note
      CaseGetter --> Analysis : Female cases in target Countries

      Analysis -> PopGetter : getMalePopulation()
      activate PopGetter
      PopGetter -> InfoGetter : getDataURL()
      activate InfoGetter
      InfoGetter --> PopGetter : API Endpoint URL
      deactivate InfoGetter
      PopGetter -> CovidAPI : API Call
      activate CovidAPI
      CovidAPI --> PopGetter : API Information
      deactivate CovidAPI
      PopGetter --> Analysis : Male population in target Countries
      deactivate PopGetter

      Analysis -> PopGetter : getFemalePopulation()
      note right of PopGetter
        A call to the endpoint has\nalready been made so\nanother is not necessary
      end note
      PopGetter --> Analysis : Female population in target Countries
    end
  else DeathsPerCapitaAnalysis
    par
      Analysis -> DeathGetter : getDeaths()
      activate DeathGetter
      DeathGetter -> InfoGetter : getDataURL()
      activate InfoGetter
      InfoGetter --> DeathGetter : API Endpoint URL
      deactivate InfoGetter
      DeathGetter -> CovidAPI : API Call
      activate CovidAPI
      CovidAPI --> DeathGetter : API Information
      deactivate CovidAPI
      DeathGetter --> Analysis : Deaths in target Countries
      deactivate DeathGetter

      Analysis -> PopGetter : getPopulation()
      activate PopGetter
      PopGetter -> InfoGetter : getDataURL()
      activate InfoGetter
      InfoGetter --> PopGetter : API Endpoint URL
      deactivate InfoGetter
      PopGetter -> CovidAPI : API Call
      activate CovidAPI
      CovidAPI --> PopGetter : API Information
      deactivate CovidAPI
      PopGetter --> Analysis : Population of target Countries
      deactivate PopGetter
    end
  end

  Analysis --> Exec : Analysis Result
  deactivate Analysis
end

Exec --> User : Finish (void)
deactivate Exec

note left of User
  Per country analysis results\nare stored for later rendering
end note

@enduml
```
